title: Device Home screen - Software version
scenario: Verify that the software version is displayed correctly on the Device Home screen according to device-specific format requirements.
steps: Navigate to the Device Home screen.
Locate the software version display area.
Check the device type (Morpheus, Neo, or Chronos).
If the device is Morpheus: Verify the SW version is in format X.Y where X is the firmware version and Y is the language version.
If the device is Neo or Chronos: Verify the SW version is displayed in setid format (e.g., 0.0.285.1601).
expected: The software version is displayed correctly on the Device Home screen according to the device type: Morpheus devices show SW version in X.Y format (X = firmware version, Y = language version); Neo and Chronos devices show SW version in setid format (e.g., 0.0.285.1601).
